# fly_organization (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Fly.io organization by slug.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "fly_organization" "org" {
  slug = "my-org"
}

output "org_name" {
  value = data.fly_organization.org.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `slug` (String) The organization slug to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The organization ID.
- `name` (String) The organization name.
- `paid_plan` (Boolean) Whether the organization is on a paid plan.
- `type` (String) The organization type.
